data.body: Realigned to the SHIPPED code-grounding oracle (prereq epic 8f6c, now CLOSED): P2/P3/P4 consume the src/rebar/grounding/ facade (refute_absence/applies/scan) — universal-ctags (T1 resolution), deps.dev+syft (T0 deps), scc/lizard (size) — NOT new tool integrations. Corrected the stale 'LSP via solidlsp' for P2 (ctags is the v1 resolver; solidlsp/LSP is the T2 follow-on epic 850f). Fail-open is the oracle's abstain-by-default contract. See epic 5fd2 prerequisite-foundations update.
